case_title: SHAMROCK MOVING & STORAGE INC. VS ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $375.00 FILED BY ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SHAMROCK MOVING & STORAGE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SHAMROCK MOVING & STORAGE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SHAMROCK MOVING & STORAGE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAMROCK MOVING & STORAGE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHAMROCK MOVING & STORAGE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
